[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1101010 4
1 0111110 5
2 0000101 2
3 1001111 5
4 0010111 4
5 1101010 4
6 0111110 5
7 0011101 4

12 21 1000011 3
23 32 0001111 4

67 76 0011011 4
70 07 1101010 4 match 0 5

72 27 0010111 4 match 4
